name: No-Bread Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 3 large hard cooked eggs, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the egg salad filling by combining chopped eggs, celery, mayonnaise, and hot pepper sauce until blended.
2. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
3. On each plate, spread a layer of egg salad on 4 cheese slices.
4. Place tomato slices over the egg salad.
5. Add lettuce leaves and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cover with remaining cheese slices.
7. Serve with pickles and olives.
